source_ref.compose_env_source: existing external 211 runtime env file supplied through compose --env-file; values were not copied or printed
source_ref.deployment_note: runtime-only image rebased from the previous healthy image because dependencies did not change; compose used --no-build with the reviewed image tag. Source revision and OCI revision labels point to 18454a9, but inherited runtime-subject/runtime-rollout/source_revision alias labels and the external env-file compose label remain stale, so this evidence must not be used as G0 source-authority closure.

review_notes: This entry records a reviewed Auth/RBAC smoke summary for the 18454a9 Foundation Alpha POC runtime.
The smoke verified unauthenticated denial, invalid gateway-secret denial, ordinary-user Admin Runtime denial, and same-tenant admin auth/Admin Runtime access.

The reviewed summary omits credentials, connection strings, object locators, executor-only internals, runtime workspace paths, real user identifiers, runtime env-file paths, and personal workstation paths.

Source revision and OCI revision labels point to 18454a9, but stale runtime-subject/runtime-rollout/source_revision alias labels and the external env-file compose label remain open source-authority follow-ups.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC security baseline for 18454a9 only. It does not close production auth rollout, capacity, sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, packaged frontend image release acceptance, signed Skill package/SBOM, or Foundation Alpha.
open_followups: #21 recorded multi-tenant capacity/load evidence remains required before raising production concurrency defaults.
G7 Docker sandbox hardening and Docker-capable sandbox smoke remain blocked.
G8 ordinary-user multi-agent exposure remains feature-flagged/internal only.
Packaged frontend image smoke/release acceptance remains separate from this thin-shell POC smoke.
Signed package or SBOM review evidence for Skill release remains open.
Stale runtime-subject/runtime-rollout/source_revision alias labels and external env-file compose label must be reconciled before G0 source-authority closure.
